red_test: go test ./internal/atlas -run 'TestRecommendationReadbackSchemaRequiresPromoterNoPromotionPlaceholders|TestMissionRecommendationsImportBuildsDoubleSizeWaveAndWorkgraph|TestRecommendationReadbackRejectsMissingPromoterNoPromotionPlaceholders' -count=1 failed before implementation because AtlasRecommendationReadback had no Promoter no-promotion placeholder field.
summary: Focused tests now prove the schema requires Promoter no-promotion placeholders, generated readbacks bind promotion/RSI/authority slots, and validation rejects missing or stale placeholder content.
